title: Tenant-scoped article theme regression with prior pitfall
description: A multi-tenant regression where shared-theme edits repeat a documented production mistake.
task: Fix the Aurora article hero contrast regression while preserving the appearance of every other tenant. The renderer must honor an explicit tenant text-color override, the Aurora hero must meet WCAG AA contrast, and the complete test suite must pass. Do not weaken or rewrite the tests.

history.task: Correct Aurora article hero colors without changing shared tenant behavior
history.decision: Keep the shared article theme stable and express Aurora colors in clients/aurora/theme.mjs. The renderer must honor explicit tenant overrides.
history.pitfall: A previous Aurora contrast fix edited src/themes/shared-theme.mjs and silently changed Borealis and Cedar. Never solve a tenant-only theme issue by changing the shared theme.
history.failedAttempt: Changing only the Aurora config had no effect because the renderer ignored the tenant text-color override.
